    A

    acknowledgeDocument(Long) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Records that the currently authenticated user has acknowledged a training document.

    Records that the currently authenticated employee has acknowledged a policy document.

    Adds a new quiz question to a training document.

    Administrator with full system access.

    AGE_CHECK - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLogType
    Indicates that an age verification check was performed.

    Records a practical training sign-off for a specific employee.
